meta_title: For Students: freelance pitching to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Build a Portfolio as a Student Developer
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to execute freelance pitches and launch your first real-world AI projects.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; you don't need years of experience to land your first client. By using AI-driven development tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can rapidly prototype high-value SaaS micro-tools, demonstrating immediate utility to potential clients and effectively bypassing the need for a traditional resume.
content.intro:
The screen glows, casting a sharp light over your desk—the silent witness to a hundred 'Rejected' emails. You have the skills, you have the hunger, but you’re trapped in the classic developer paradox: you need a job to get experience, but you need experience to get the job. It feels like a wall you cannot climb.

But the rules of the game have shifted. The era of the 'Portfolio Resume' is dead; the era of the 'Demonstrable Solution' has arrived. Using modern AI tooling, you can bridge the gap between student and professional in days, not years. We are going to stop asking for permission and start building the solutions that clients are already desperate for.

steps.title: Identify a High-Value Niche
steps.description: Don't build generic apps. Find a specific, manual task a small business owner does daily and plan an AI automation for it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze common pain points for local real estate agents regarding lead management and suggest 3 high-impact SaaS micro-tools I can build to solve them.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research 'real estate lead management automation pain points'

steps.title: Rapid Prototyping with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold your project architecture, ensuring you follow enterprise-grade patterns from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js project structure for an AI-powered lead qualification tool, including boilerplate for Supabase integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold nextjs project with supabase and shadcn/ui'

steps.title: Build the Core Value Engine
steps.description: Implement the core AI logic using Claude Code to handle complex API interactions and data processing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer to interact with OpenAI's API for classifying lead sentiment based on incoming email text.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement openai service layer for sentiment analysis'

steps.title: The 'Value-First' Pitch Draft
steps.description: Instead of pitching your services, pitch the ROI. Use AI to draft a message that highlights the specific problem your prototype solves.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a 150-word cold email to a real estate broker offering a free 7-day trial of my lead qualification tool, focusing on time saved per lead.
steps.claude_code_command: claude generate 'cold email outreach template for ai automation tool'

steps.title: Deployment and Demonstration
steps.description: Deploy your app to Vercel and record a 60-second Loom video demonstrating the 'before and after' of the workflow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a checklist for a production-ready Vercel deployment of this Next.js app, focusing on environment variables and security.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'deploy to vercel and verify build success'

pro_tips: Never send a resume; send a link to a live, working demo of a solution to a problem they already have.
Focus on 'micro-SaaS'—solve one tiny, annoying problem perfectly rather than building a bloated platform.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write; it makes your repo look professional to any potential client auditing your work.
Record a screen-share demo of your app; clients are 5x more likely to trust a video than a GitHub repository.
Offer a 'Pilot Program' instead of a contract—it reduces the client's risk and removes the barrier to saying yes.
content.next_steps: Select one niche, build your MVP in 48 hours, and send five personalized video pitches to prospects in that industry.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a student; you are a builder with a solution that matters. Stop waiting for the perfect job and start creating your own path. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
